response:
Sec. 1  
[DEFINE THE VARIABLES AND EQUATIONS FOR THE TWO PUBLISHERS]  

Sec. 2  
[THE TOTAL EARNINGS FROM PUBLISHER A CAN BE REPRESENTED AS 3000 PLUS 5% OF THE TOTAL SALES REVENUE]  

Sec. 3  
[THE TOTAL EARNINGS FROM PUBLISHER B CAN BE REPRESENTED AS 1500 PLUS 10% OF THE TOTAL SALES REVENUE]  

Sec. 4  
[TO DETERMINE WHEN PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE, SET UP AN INEQUALITY WHERE PUBLISHER A'S EARNINGS ARE GREATER THAN PUBLISHER B'S EARNINGS]  

Sec. 5  
[SOLVE THE INEQUALITY TO FIND THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE WHERE PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE]  

Sec. 6  
[IF THE WRITER ANTICIPATES SALES REVENUE BETWEEN 10000 AND 40000, SUBSTITUTE THESE VALUES INTO THE INEQUALITY TO DETERMINE THE SPECIFIC RANGE]  

Sec. 7  
[THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE WHERE PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE IS FOUND TO BE BETWEEN 15000 AND 40000]  

Sec. 8  
[THE WRITER SHOULD CHOOSE PUBLISHER A IF HER TOTAL SALES REVENUE IS BETWEEN 15000 AND 40000]
